jobs.title: Senior Frontend Developer | Vue.js
jobs.rawDescription: About us We’re iubenda, the team turning compliance into a growth engine. We help over 110K businesses all around the world build trust, boost performance, and grow without limits. Now part of team.blue ( we’re scaling privacy tech with confidence, creativity, and a little bit of attitude. Join a team that moves fast, thinks big, and makes privacy feel exciting again! Mission & Core Purpose We’re looking for a brilliant and motivated Senior Vue.js Developer to join our team. You will report to our Head of Frontend and will be fully responsible for designing, developing and maintaining frontend applications through Vue.js and Vanilla. Key Responsibilities • Ensuring a high test coverage; • Migrating sections of Bootstrap/jQuery code in order to use Vue.js without regressions; • Lead Code Reviews and mentor colleagues; • Create a positive environment for the people around you, share knowledge with everyone, and help the team grow; • Collaborate with designers, other team leads, and stakeholders to understand business goals, analyze requirements and propose technical solutions. It won't just be about writing code. Experience & Skills • At least 7 years of experience in JavaScript and solid experience in Vue.js; • Ownership in managing projects and ensuring that everything goes as expected at a delivery level; • Great knowledge of modern bundlers (e.g. Webpack, Rollup, Vite), cross-browser compatibility issues and how to work around them; • Experience in Unit testing on JavaScript; • Experience with GitHub or GitLab and a solid understanding of Git core concepts; • Full professional proficiency in English; • Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Added Values • Experience in migrating existing codebases to Vue.js; • Experience with other frameworks (i.e. Angular, React or Svelte); • Experience with server-side technologies (i.e. Ruby on Rails, Node.js and PHP); • Basic understanding of server-side CSS pre-processing platforms (i.e. LESS, SASS); • Deep underst

score.reason: Strong Vue.js senior match with modern tooling (Vite), testing priority, and CET timezone alignment. TypeScript not mentioned and role is migration-heavy (Bootstrap/jQuery → Vue), so expect legacy modernization over greenfield work.

jobs.title: Full stack Developer VUE JS
jobs.rawDescription: AGAP2 è un gruppo europeo di consulenza ingegneristica e operativa facente parte del Gruppo MoOngy . Siamo alla ricerca di un/una Senior Full Stack Developer qualificato/a, con esperienza nello sviluppo di applicazioni web moderne e scalabili. La figura sarà coinvolta in tutte le fasi del ciclo di vita del software, dalla progettazione all’implementazione, lavorando in un contesto agile e collaborativo. Progettare, sviluppare e mantenere applicazioni web full stack Collaborare con team cross-funzionali (UX/UI, DevOps, Product Owner) Contribuire alla definizione dell’architettura software Ottimizzare le performance e garantire la qualità delle applicazioni Supportare e guidare sviluppatori più junior Familiarità con metodologie Agile / sviluppo iterativo Ottima conoscenza di TypeScript js Esperienza con database PostgreSQL e scrittura di query SQL Front-end: Esperienza con TypeScript Ottima conoscenza di Vue.js 3 Inoltre, teniamo fede ai nostri impegni prestando attenzione alle risorse appartenenti alle categorie protette ai sensi degli articoli 1 e 18 della Legge 68/99. I dati personali saranno trattati in conformità alle disposizioni contenute nel regolamento UE 2016/679.

score.reason: Excellent Vue.js 3 + TypeScript match with Italian location (native speaker, EU timezone). Senior role with team-lead aspects (mentoring junior devs). Full-stack scope but backend framework and remote policy not specified.

jobs.title: Senior Front-end Engineer - REMOTE - VUE.JS
jobs.rawDescription: YOUR ROLE We need someone like you to help create software solutions that help millions of users make informed decisions. If you’re looking to make an impact while leveraging groundbreaking technologies, this is the place for you. At Launch Potato you will be an integral member of the LP Tech Team where you will have the opportunity to lead our technical path and be empowered to drive our products. Our team has built groundbreaking technology that helps us understand our millions of users and helps them reach their personal goals every day across our portfolio of brands. On any given day you might be working on our proprietary platform creating solutions that improve the UIs we use to visualize and manage our data. Or you might be improving the user experience on one of our owned and operated sites by launching a new product. Whatever it may be, you will be making an impact! You will be working cross-functionally with passionate, extremely smart individuals with tons of opportunities for learning, growth, and mentorship. We are an extremely fun and tight-knit team (our company retreats are fabulous), so we are very selective about who we hire to ensure our company values remain high. As part of the LP Tech Team, will have access to the best tools to remove any blockers and enable your success. On a typical day you might: • Develop javascript component-based plugins • Write front end code for dashboards that allow non-technical users to intuitively interact with data • Collaborate with product managers, designers, stakeholders, anyone to help create the best product possible • Coach and mentor other engineers on best practices • Research new technologies and prototype potential solutions • Lead discussions about project architecture and technical feasibility • Build internal tools used to increase team productivity Our current tech stack: • Frontend languages and Libraries • HTML5/Javascript, • jQuery, Vue.js, React, Node.js, GraphQL • CSS Grid, flexbox, bootstrap, m

score.reason: Vue.js is primary per the title with senior responsibilities including architecture leadership and mentorship. However, TypeScript is not mentioned, React is also listed as primary, and Python/Django backend is outside Alfonso's core expertise.

jobs.title: Senior Vue Js Developer - FULL REMOTE
jobs.rawDescription: Siamo una software house italiana attiva dal 1998, composta da un team di 25 professionisti. Progettiamo e sviluppiamo gestionali complessi web-based , rivolgendoci principalmente a casse edili e scuole edili su tutto il territorio nazionale. Lavoriamo con tecnologie moderne e architetture all'avanguardia, credendo in un approccio pragmatico, agile e collaborativo, dove ogni sviluppatore è protagonista del successo dei nostri progetti. Sarai il referente tecnico per le attività di DevOps o per la sicurezza del software. Hai almeno 5 anni di esperienza consolidata nello sviluppo software. Hai un'eccellente padronanza di C#, JavaScript framework (es. Angular, React, Vue.js) e MS SQL. Possiedi competenze solide in almeno una tra DevOps o Sicurezza Informatica. Sei analitico, autonomo nella gestione dei progetti e orientato alla qualità. Flessibilità organizzativa: possibilità di lavorare fino al 100% da remoto (previsti solo due incontri annuali per team building, a giugno e dicembre). Contratto a tempo indeterminato.

score.reason: Vue.js is the title focus and Italian location matches your native language—excellent for remote work from Valencia. However, the role demands excellent C# mastery and DevOps or cybersecurity specialization, both outside your current skill set. This is a full-stack role heavier in backend complexity than your profile indicates.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - Python, Django, PostgreSQL, and Vue.js
jobs.rawDescription: The Senior Software Engineer develops, tests, and maintains applications using Python, Django, PostgreSQL, and Vue.js within our AWS-centric SaaS environment. While primarily focused on full-stack development, familiarity with DevOps practices supports efficient development and release processes. This role requires strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work across all aspects of a multi-tiered architecture. The ideal candidate is self-motivated, detail-oriented, adaptable, customer-focused, and eager to mentor team members. They identify areas for improvement and act on them. You will collaborate with engineers, managers, product management, and operations to deliver solutions that meet customer, business, and technical requirements. Key Responsibilities Development and Architecture • Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications • Perform code and design reviews with the development team • Develop and maintain automated testing frameworks • Design and implement monitoring and alerting solutions • Monitor and remediate security vulnerabilities (dependency CVEs, infrastructure misconfigurations) DevOps and Infrastructure • Design and implement CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation • Manage release processes and develop release documentation • Ensure team adherence to development and release best practices • Manage and maintain Kubernetes clusters and containerized workloads • Update and maintain AWS infrastructure, including networking, security groups, and cloud resources Collaboration and Improvement • Participate in Agile ceremonies and collaborate daily with the delivery team • Track and improve developer experience • Introduce new tools and practices to improve how the team builds and ships software • Master and help the team adopt AI-assisted development tools such as Claude Code and GitH Required Qualifications • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field (or equivalent experience) • 5+ years of

score.reason: Python and Django are core requirements (Alfonso has no production experience in either), with Vue secondary to backend/DevOps responsibilities. Explicit Claude Code mention is a strong signal but insufficient to offset the Python/Django core-stack risk.

jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Developer (Kotlin, Vue.js) (Remote, Full-Time) [AS197]
jobs.rawDescription: About Smart Working At Smart Working, we believe your job should not only look right on paper but also feel right every day. This isn’t just another remote opportunity - it’s about finding where you truly belong, no matter where you are. From day one, you’re welcomed into a genuine community that values your growth and well-being. Our mission is simple: to break down geographic barriers and connect skilled professionals with outstanding global teams and products for full-time, long-term roles. We help you discover meaningful work with teams that invest in your success, where you’re empowered to grow personally and professionally. Join one of the highest-rated workplaces on Glassdoor and experience what it means to thrive in a truly remote-first world. About the role We are looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer to join a long-term engineering initiative focused on building and evolving business-critical systems. This role is suited to a genuine senior engineer who is comfortable taking ownership, working across the stack, and contributing to architectural and delivery decisions. You will play a key role in developing and maintaining scalable applications using Kotlin on the backend and Vue.js on the frontend, working as part of a collaborative engineering team while maintaining a high degree of autonomy. Responsibilities • Design, build, and maintain full-stack features using Kotlin and Vue.js • Take ownership of complex technical tasks from implementation through to production • Contribute to system design and technical decision-making appropriate to a senior-level role • Collaborate closely with other engineers and stakeholders to deliver reliable, maintainable solutions • Ensure high standards of code quality, performance, and reliability across the stack • Support ongoing improvements to existing systems as part of a long-term product roadmap Requirements • 6+ years total professional software development experience (senior-level expectation) • Kotlin: 3+ yea

score.reason: Vue.js is primary and senior seniority aligns with your profile, but this full-stack role requires 3+ years of Kotlin backend expertise—a language completely outside your current stack. The 50/50 backend/frontend split means the steep backend learning curve would directly impact your day-one productivity.

jobs.title: Front-end Developer Vue.js (Full remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Milano | Full Remote Tipologia di Contratto: Collaborazione Freelance o Contratto Determinato Di seguito, troverà un'analisi completa di tutti i requisiti per i potenziali candidati e le istruzioni su come candidarsi. Frontend / Full Stack Software Developer In Assist-x, quando realizziamo un prodotto, fra le nostre priorità c’è quella di sviluppare codice e infrastrutture all’avanguardia, allineate con i moderni stack tecnologici e seguendo le best practice di sviluppo per garantire manutenibilità e scalabilità del software nel lungo periodo. Cerchiamo un Frontend Software Developer capace di contribuire allo sviluppo di soluzioni software di alta qualità. La figura lavorerà in sinergia con i team di product design, UX/UI e Backend per tradurre i requisiti in soluzioni affidabili e scalabili. Siamo aperti a profili mid ma anche junior purché ragionevolmente autonomi. Descrizione dell’azienda Assist-x è una giovane realtà tech specializzata nell’offrire soluzioni software, AI e infrastruttura cloud ad aziende che necessitano di innovare il proprio business o sviluppare prodotti da lanciare sul mercato. Sviluppo, implementazione e manutenzione di interfacce web e mobile utilizzando React e React Native. Gestione avanzata dello stato dell’applicazione (Zustand, Context API) Integrazione con le API RESTful o GraphQL fornite dal backend. Collaborazione costante con UI/UX designer e sviluppatori backend per garantire un’integrazione fluida e la migliore esperienza utente (UX) possibile. Ottima padronanza di JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript e npm. Comprovata esperienza nello sviluppo di componenti riutilizzabili con React e React Native. Solida base nei linguaggi web fondamentali (HTML5, CSS3/SASS, architettura del DOM) e approccio Mobile First / Responsive Design. Conoscenza dei principi fondanti del Software Engineering (Clean Code, design pattern). Gradita conoscenza del framework Vue.js. js per interfacciarsi meglio con il team backend. Familiarità con Docker, containeri

score.reason: React and React Native are the primary stack with Vue.js only as 'nice-to-have'—violating the hard requirement that Vue be primary. The role is explicitly marketed for mid/junior profiles, not senior. While the company is Italian-based and remote, the stack and seniority mismatch make this a poor fit.
red_flags: Vue.js is secondary to React/React Native
No Capacitor or Ionic (no mobile specialization match)
